messageList.loadOlderFailed: Could not load older messages. Try again.

settings.subtitle: Manage app preferences and providers for active workspace.

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.unavailable: Plugin management was removed by the last harness migration fix. The entry point is visible again; management actions need to be reconnected to the new harness API.
plugins.invalidInstallSource: Enter a valid source (e.g. owner/repo@skill-name or a URL).

general.defaultChatDirectoryHelp: New chats start in this working directory.
general.newChatModelBehaviorHelp: Choose how OpenGUI preselects the LLM model when starting a fresh chat.
general.fileManagerHelp: Command to open your file manager (e.g. nemo, nautilus). Leave empty to auto-detect.
general.terminalHelp: Command to open your terminal (e.g. ghostty, kitty). Leave empty to auto-detect.
general.hideOldModelsHelp: Selected and favorite models always stay visible. Models without a valid release date also stay visible.
general.restartLocalBackendDescription: This reloads OpenGUI's local backend and then refreshes the app. Running turns may be interrupted.

sidebar.title: Sidebar
sidebar.needWorkspaceBeforeProjects: Add a workspace before you can connect projects.

sessionMenu.deleteSessionConfirm:
Delete "{{title}}"?

This permanently deletes the session and cannot be undone.

prompt.steerDirection: Steer the model into a direction...
prompt.currentRootWorktree: Current branch of the root worktree.
prompt.queueTitle: Queue: wait for full response, then send (Ctrl/Cmd+D to toggle)
prompt.steerTitle: Steer: wait for current part to finish, then send (Ctrl/Cmd+D to toggle)

variantSelector.thinkingEffort: Thinking effort: {{level}} (click or Ctrl+T to cycle, Ctrl+Shift+T to cycle backward)

modelSelector.harnessLocked: Harness is locked for this session.
modelSelector.noModelsForHarness: No models for this harness in this project.
modelSelector.noModelsForHarnessHint: Try another harness or check provider credentials in Settings.
modelSelector.noHarnessInstalled: No harness CLI is installed. Install one in Settings to choose a model.
modelSelector.harnessCliFound: Installed — connect in Settings if models are missing

toolOutput.rawDescription: Original textual output returned by the tool.

workspace.addDescription: Connect to an OpenGUI Backend as a new workspace.
workspace.editDescription: Rename this workspace or update its access token. Create a new workspace to use a different Backend URL.
workspace.name: Name
workspace.requiredBeforeProject: Add a workspace before connecting a project.

identity.setupDescription: Create the first account for {{host}}. This account will own the Host and its settings.
identity.loginDescription: Enter your account details to use {{host}}.
identity.registerDescription: Register for {{host}}. An owner must still share folders before you can open projects.
identity.switchToLogin: Already have an account? Sign in
identity.hostPolicyDescription: Control how people join this Host and who may send invites.

registrationModeHelp.invite_only: Only people with an invite can create an account.
registrationModeHelp.open: Anyone with the Host URL can create an account. They still need shared folders to work.

identity.unavailableDescription: OpenGUI could not check the identity status of {{host}}.
identity.connectionError: Could not connect to the Host.
identity.authenticationError: Authentication failed. Check your details and try again.
identity.acceptInviteDescription: Create your account to join the Team on {{host}}.
identity.inviteAcceptError: This invite could not be accepted. It may be invalid, expired, or already used.
identity.membersDescription: People with accounts on this Host. Sessions and folders are private until shared.
identity.noMembers: No members were returned by this Host.
identity.removeMemberConfirm: Remove this member from the Team? Their active Host access will be revoked.
identity.resetPasswordDescription: Set a temporary password and share it securely. It is not saved in OpenGUI.
identity.invitesDescription: Invite links grant access to this Host. Share them only with people you trust.
identity.inviteCreatedDescription: Copy this link now. For security, it will not be shown again after you close this window.
identity.revokeInviteConfirm: Revoke this invite link? It will stop working immediately.
identity.apiKeysDescription: Named credentials for automation. Secrets are shown once and cannot be recovered.
identity.revokeKeyConfirm: Revoke this API key? Applications using it will lose access immediately.
identity.keyCreatedDescription: Copy this secret now. It will not be shown again after you close this window.
identity.teamLoadError: Team settings could not be loaded. Owner access may be required.
identity.teamRemoteOnly: Team settings are available for signed-in Remote Hosts.
identity.teamOwnerOnly: Only the signed-in Host owner can manage Team settings.
identity.actionError: The Host could not complete this action. Try again.

pathGrants.title: Project access for {{name}}
pathGrants.description: Choose which directories this account or key can use. Saving replaces its complete access list.
pathGrants.noAccessDescription: This account or key cannot open any directory-backed Projects.
pathGrants.shellDisabled: Shell is disabled for this restricted account or key while path enforcement is active.
pathGrants.loadError: Project access could not be loaded. Try closing and reopening the editor.
pathGrants.saveError: Project access could not be saved. Check that every path is an existing allowed directory.

identity.invitePathsHelp: Only folders you can access are shown. The invite cannot grant more access than you have.

modelPolicy.allowByokHelp: Let people add their own API-key model connections. Host denial overrides Team settings.
modelPolicy.allowByosHelp: Let people connect supported model subscriptions. Host denial overrides Team settings.

mcp.title: MCPs
mcp.description: Toggle MCP servers on or off for this session.
mcp.noManagement: Current backend has no MCP management.
mcp.loadTimedOut: Loading tools is taking longer than expected.

worktree.createFor: Create a new git worktree for
worktree.pathHelp: A new directory will be created at this path.

worktreeCleanup.title: No sessions remaining
worktreeCleanup.descriptionSuffix: has no active sessions. Would you like to remove it?
worktreeCleanup.deleteFromDisk: Also delete worktree files from disk

codex.title: ChatGPT
codex.description: Use your ChatGPT subscription with Codex models.

xai.title: SuperGrok
xai.description: Use your SuperGrok or eligible X Premium+ subscription.

opencode.title: OpenCode Go
opencode.description: Paste the API key from your OpenCode Go subscription.

zen.title: OpenCode Zen
zen.description: Enable free, rate-limited Zen models without an API key, or add your own key for your OpenCode Zen account.

providers.description: Connect models used by the OpenGUI agent.
providers.noManagement: No Harness with provider management is available.
providers.loadFailed: Could not load providers. Is the OpenGUI Backend connected?
providers.envReferenceHelp: Use {env:VAR_NAME} to reference an environment variable.
providers.providerIdInvalid: Provider ID must be lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens/underscores
providers.baseUrlInvalid: Base URL must start with http:// or https://
providers.modelIdsRequired: All model IDs must be filled in
providers.modelNamesRequired: All model names must be filled in

planeHelp.host: Managed by the Host owner and available only through explicit entitlements.
planeHelp.team: Managed for the Team and available only through explicit entitlements.
planeHelp.user: Private to your account and available only in your own Sessions.

providers.teamAccessHelp: Choose which shared connections Team members can use.

setupWizard.connectModelDescription: Add an OpenAI-compatible connection. You can change this later in Settings.
setupWizard.readyDescription: OpenGUI is ready. Connect a project and start a Session with the first-party agent.
setupWizard.title: Welcome to OpenGUI
setupWizard.codingAgentFoundDescription: OpenGUI found a coding agent on this computer.
setupWizard.noHarnessInstalledDescription: OpenGUI needs a coding agent before it can work on your files.
setupWizard.checkHarnessesFailedDescription: You can continue setup and check again later.
setupWizard.harnessReadyDescription: This agent harness is ready to use.
setupWizard.harnessCliFoundDescription: The CLI is installed. Model and provider selection happens later in OpenGUI.
setupWizard.harnessNotFoundDescription: The CLI was not found on this computer.
setupWizard.defaultChatDirectoryDescription: New chats start in this folder when no project is selected.
setupWizard.folderPlaceholder: Choose a folder or leave empty
setupWizard.setupHarnessLaterTitle: You can set up a Harness later
setupWizard.readyToWorkDescription: Start by connecting a project or opening a session.
setupWizard.setupHarnessLaterDescription: OpenGUI will open now. Agent sends need a Harness before they can run.

languages.my: မြန်မာဘာသာ

projectHarnessStatus.title: Harness errors for {{project}}
projectHarnessStatus.hint: You can still type and pick another harness in the model selector. Session history may be incomplete for the harnesses listed above.

sessionError.title: Agent error
sessionError.nextStep: Next step: run this command in your terminal, then retry:
sessionError.messagesLoadFailed: Could not load messages for this session.

updateDialog.title: Update Available
updateDialog.description: A new version of OpenGUI ({{latestVersion}}) is available. You are currently running v{{currentVersion}}.

emptyStates.noProjectCanStart: Connect a project now or start a chat.
emptyStates.noProjectConnect: Connect a project to start chatting.
emptyStates.noSessionDescription: Select a session or start a new one from a connected project.
emptyStates.noWorkspaceDescription: A workspace is your OpenGUI backend. Create one, then add projects to it.
emptyStates.noSharedProjects: No project folders have been shared with your account yet. Ask the Host owner or an inviter for access.

mergeDialog.successDescriptionDelete: {{branch}} has been merged successfully. The worktree will be removed.
mergeDialog.title: Merge branch
mergeDialog.description: Merge {{branch}} into the current branch of {{repoName}}
mergeDialog.deleteWorktreeDescription: Removes the worktree directory and disconnects it from the project

projectPath.title: Open Project
projectPath.webLocalDescription: Choose a project path on the OpenGUI server. If you use this from a phone, paths are server paths, not phone files.
projectPath.localDescription: Open a local project folder for this window. You can also paste an absolute path manually.
projectPath.remoteDescription: This window is connected to a remote server, so choose a project by entering the path on that server.

sessionShare.title: Share Session
sessionShare.description: Manage access to “{{title}}”. Sessions are private until you share them.
sessionShare.private: Only you can open this Session.
sessionShare.viewLinksHelp: Anyone with a view link can read this transcript without signing in. They cannot send prompts or use tools.

viewLink.invalid: This view link is invalid, expired, or has been revoked.
viewLink.empty: This Session has no messages yet.
